caption: A man with a shaved head and a full dark beard is seated in a studio with dark, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels on the wall behind him. He is wearing a white t-shirt and over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1" and "Rode". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins by looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze forward while raising his right hand in a gesture. He briefly looks back toward the left with a focused expression before finally opening his mouth wider as if emphasizing a point, while his right hand moves rapidly across the frame. His right arm is visible, showing dark ink tattoos.
